channel.title: Block 7 — Judge :: CS Two Year Refactor

item.title: CS-206 Graphs & Network Algorithms
item.description: CS-206 — Graphs & Network Algorithms 1 credit Working description Graph traversal, shortest path, minimum spanning trees — named explicitly as optimization (best path/structure under a metric). Graphs as the most general representation (terminal Data Structures pass). Geospatial algorithms: routing/shortest-path on road networks (weighted graphs; Dijkstra, A* as geospatially-motivated heuristic search); spatial joins and range/nearest-neighbor queries using B4 spatial indexes. Signature assessment: Design Review begins here. Computational Models pass: a brief see-and-explore example of a LOGIC/CONSTRAINT model (a few Prolog-style facts/rules + a query, or a small constraint problem a solver resolves) — connects to MATH-101 predicate logic, SQL’s logical character, and the Optimization lens.

item.title: CS-207 Document Databases & Data Integration
item.description: CS-207 — Document Databases & Data Integration 1 credit Working description NoSQL data models (data that resists clean relational structure); combining disparate sources. Re-identification risk from combined datasets (Security pass). Multi-objective tradeoff reasoning — integrating for speed vs completeness vs privacy — defended in Design Review. To develop Learning outcomes / competencies evidenced Week-by-week map (8 weeks) Signature/embedded assessments Threads passing through (with pass depth) Prerequisites and standalone-extractability (for service use)

item.title: STAT-103 Random Variables, Distributions & Sampling
item.description: STAT-103 — Random Variables, Distributions & Sampling 1 credit (co-designed external) Working description (External/co-designed, stats dept. Distributions, sampling, central limit theorem.) To develop Learning outcomes / competencies evidenced Week-by-week map (8 weeks) Signature/embedded assessments Threads passing through (with pass depth) Prerequisites and standalone-extractability (for service use)
